segments.text: Austria has just launched a game-changing two-year M's pathway exclusively for Indian STEM graduates.
This new collaboration with top Austrian technical universities like TUIN and TUR GRAS offers a world-class education that blends classroom theory with valuable
industry experience. The program is designed to provide Indian engineering and technology graduates with global exposure and career support. The best part, upon completing their degree,
graduates are eligible for a one-year post study visa extension. This is a fantastic opportunity to gain international work experience and
smoothly transition into the global workforce. This initiative creates a powerful bridge for Indian talent to thrive in Europe. What are your thoughts
on this? Let us know in the comments and subscribe to Full Disclosure for
